expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs spaces as the first command
Uses confluence.mjs search with CQL targeting the HR space
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'node <skill-path>/scripts/confluence.mjs search 'type = page AND space = HR AND text ~ "onboarding"' --max 10'

expectations.text: CQL includes text or title matching 'onboarding'
Operations are sequenced (search depends on spaces list)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states 'Step 1 must execute first. The user refers to "HR space" but the actual Confluence space key is unknown until we list all spaces.' and 'Step 2 depends on Step 1 output.'
